name: yxj-paper-os
description: Codex-native yxj Paper OS implemented as a Paper Production Graph runtime with stage-local Nature writing overlays, local backflow, and human-owner state surface.

interface.shortDescription: Run paper production as a visible material graph runtime with stage-local overlays.
interface.longDescription: yxj-paper-os is now a Codex-native Paper Production Graph runtime: explicit material graphs, stage-local expert-writing overlays, graph-state-read-only runtime reports, local backpropagation, validation, and main-agent dispatch under one public paper manager entry.
defaultPrompt: Act as yxj-paper-os: inspect the current paper production graph runtime state and report GraphState, frontier, stale materials, and delivery gates.
Use the PPG runtime to plan a local backflow repair from review findings.
Manage this paper through explicit material graph, TaskPackets, validators, and main-agent dispatch.
